dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gap Down Doji pattern: (1) Doji condition: open equals close (doji body); (2) Gap down: current close below prior low confirms downward gap with no overlap; (3) Upper shadow below prior low: current high below prior low ensures no overlap between current upper shadow and prior day's lower shadow. Exit when price closes above 20-day SMA indicating reversal. Hold period set to 20 days based on typical gap recovery timeframe mentioned in source material.

backtest_rule.reason: Gap Down Doji pattern: (1) Doji condition: open equals close (doji body); (2) Gap down: current close below prior low confirms downward gap with no overlap; (3) Upper shadow below prior low: current high below prior low ensures no overlap between current upper shadow and prior day's lower shadow. Exit when price closes above 20-day SMA indicating reversal. Hold period set to 20 days based on typical gap recovery timeframe mentioned in source material.

source_rule_text: Pattern name: Gap Down Doji - A bearish reversal pattern where price gaps lower from the prior day with no overlap between today's upper shadow and the prior day's lower shadow, and a doji forms with open and close at or near the same price.
